use_cases: AI chatbot interfaces requiring multi-modal input with text and file attachments
Support chat systems where users need to attach documents or images
Collaborative messaging platforms with rich input capabilities
Conversational AI assistants needing expandable text areas
Developer tools with integrated chat functionality for code assistance
ai_summary: A sophisticated chat input component built for AI-powered conversational interfaces, featuring auto-resizing textarea, animated file attachment handling with smooth height transitions, customizable action icons, and integrated send functionality. Composes Button and Textarea components with Framer Motion animations for a polished, production-ready chat composer experience.
